variant.hypothesis: C1: on the liquid top-500 A-share universe, an equal-weight top-20 portfolio ranked by the value(E/P)+low_vol z-composite, rebalanced at low cadence with a rank-exit buffer so annual book turnover stays <= 2.0x, delivers post-cost same-gross alpha whose bootstrap CI clears zero vs BOTH CSI300 and EW-liquid, full-sample and walk-forward.
variant.causal_logic_label: unestablished — value/low_vol IC is real [validated against data]; that a low-cost tilt converts it into net alpha (not premia) is the unproven step
expected_failure_modes: premia-not-alpha (most likely): vs-EW CI keeps straddling zero -> kill and close the line
concentration noise: top-K idiosyncratic noise swamps the weak IC
stale-rank decay: lower cadence -> composite information decays before the next rebalance
low_vol crowding post-2017 -> the premium thins exactly when measurable

test_plan.claim_gate: ci_positive_after_cost vs CSI300 AND EW + WF1 + exact-name OOS not sig-neg + 19-gate PASS (Junyan-ratified, strict)
